title: Cobblemon Freedom Frontiers
description: A Cobblemon Dungeon Adventure Pack that adds addicting exploration with Pokemon quests, Cobblemon loot from dungeons, and a completely revamped combat system.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DWfcxGxPPGA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This pack has Legendary Quests, all of the gimicks from Mega Showdown, TMs you can find in loot chests, massively tweaked performance, and a ton of QoL mods that will help keep the adventure going!**

**Important notes!:** 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Make sure you have at least 6GB-8GB of ram allocated to this pack to avoid crashes and have a smooth experience!
- Make sure you're playing the right version! The client version is for playing the game, the server version is exclusively used to run a dedicated server!
- This modpack is new, so feel free to give suggestions or report bugs!

</details>



**What makes this pack EPIC and different:**

While some packs throw together mods and call it a day, Freedom Frontiers takes a different approach. While there are popular mods like Yung's Better Dungeons and Dungeons Arise (along with some rising star mods you may not even have heard of), this pack integrates Cobblemon loot into nearly every experience. Every dungeon, every pillager outpost, every experience has Cobblemon in mind. Climb Gimiighoul Towers for a chance to get a paraglider, set up a Cobbledollar merchant to buy valuable items like Mega Shodwown Gimick gear, even create farms where Cobblemon work for you. So while you may see your favorite mods in this pack, we wanted to make sure there were some mods you haven't experienced and that they all worked together!

## The Cobblemon:

- **All The Mons** (Using All The Mons X Mega Showdown, pretty much every mon is here!)
- **Cobblemon Raid Dens** (Fight Pokemon Raids with friends to gain access to powerful Dynamax, Mega, Paradox and Legendary Pokemon)
- **Fight or Flight** (Pokemon fight alongside you, aiding in wiping out pillager camps, massive dungeons or other wild Pokemon)
- **Cobbleworkers** (When you're ready to settle into your own base, let Cobblemon harvest apricorns, crops, gather items and much more)
- **Cobblemon Ride On** (Hop on your favorite mount and travel to your next dungeon adventure)
- **Cobbled Levels** (Harsher environments in certain biomes have made the Pokemon living there more powerful. Expect to see high level Pokemon in Cold Biomes and Hot Biomes, and even more powerful Pokemon in the Nether and the End)

## The World:

- **Legendary Monuments** (Travel the land with your trusty Arc Phone to find Legendary Structures that house some of the strongest legendary Pokemon in the game!)
- **Lots of Dungeons** (Around every corner, you can take on exciting challenges to get awesome loot. The bigger the dungeon, the better the reward. Get items for leveling your character OR your Pokemon! Many dungeons have been revamped, from the stronghold to even the Ancient City. You may not even have experienced these strucutre layouts before!)
- **A Living Breathing World** (Towns have immersive villagers to trade with and guards to protect you, camps hold either friendly faces or pillagers to defeat. Ruins dot the world. Wherever you go, there's always something to do!)
- **Scorchful and Frostful** (This pack makes certain biomes harsher. Heat management for hot biomes and cold management for cold biomes will keep you on your toes.)

## The Combat:

- **Better Combat** (Gives new animations to most weapons in the game)
- **ReArm: Combat Overhaul** (Bows, crossbows, swords, axes and shields have new combat mechanics. New enchantments are introduced giving more protection to physical moves and special type attacks from Cobblemon)
- **Guarding** (Adds a perfect parry to shields)
- **Ars Elixirum** (Overhauls potion creation to create customized potion effects for any occasion)
- **More weapons** (Basic Weapons adds daggers, hammers, clubs, quaterstaffs, spears and glaives, while Cobblemon Armory adds epic Pokemon themed weapons)
- **More armor** (Immersive armor adds more armor sets while Cobblemon Armory adds epic Pokemon related armor)


## A Fresh Look:

- **Fresh Moves with Animated Eyes** (Revamps player animations)
- **Fresh Animations** (Reanimates every vanilla mob with some fun suprises)
- **Multiple Weather Addons** (Makes weather more cinematic and immersive with sounds and visuals)
- **BSL Shaders** (With some performance tweaks, BSL Shaders has a staple in establishing the bright and epic tone of Freedom Frontiers)
- **Biome overhauls for most dimensions**

**AND MUCH MORE!**

## Planned updates

**Some of these are doable and some of these are dreams of mine. Check out my discord channel if you would like to contribute!**

- Add Dungeon Difficulty mod for harder dungeons and better loot
- Add custom music (Working on an Original Soundtrack as we speak. MAYBE it'll get done)
- Add a custom mod that creates massive, handcrafted dungeons similiar to breath of the wild that are accessed in a seperate dimension (maybe through dungeonZ? Or similiar)
- Update to Cobblemon 1.7 when all the mods are finished updating
